facts: This actor voiced a beloved cowboy doll in a series of animated films about a group of toys that come to life.
Won consecutive Academy Awards for playing a lawyer battling AIDS and a man with a low IQ who experiences key moments in U.S. history.
Starred as a stranded man on a deserted island where his only companion is a volleyball.
Portrayed the captain of a U.S. cargo ship that gets hijacked by Somali pirates, delivering the memorable line, "I am the captain now."
Played an astronaut in a true story about a failed mission to the moon, where his crew struggles to return to Earth safely.
Known for his role as a beloved children's TV show host who taught kindness and empathy, based on a real-life figure.
Starred as a FedEx employee whose survival story spans four years after a plane crash, where he creates an entire world to cope with isolation.
Delivered mail in a film set in a post-apocalyptic America, where he becomes a symbol of hope and rebuilding society.
This actress is well-known for playing a spy with red hair in a superhero franchise, where she often uses martial arts and high-tech gadgets.
She starred in a futuristic film where her character's consciousness is uploaded into an AI, making her one of the first post-human beings.
In a critically acclaimed indie film, she played a woman navigating a complicated relationship with her estranged husband, set against the backdrop of a messy divorce.
This actress voiced a sultry, intelligent operating system in a thought-provoking sci-fi film, capturing the complexities of human-AI relationships.
She portrayed an alien who preys on unsuspecting men in a dark and surreal film set in Scotland.
She earned praise for her role in a World War II satire, where she played a mother hiding a Jewish girl while raising her young son under the Nazi regime.
This actress starred in a live-action adaptation of a popular anime, portraying a cyber-enhanced soldier with a mysterious past.
She made her breakthrough as a young actress in a comedy-drama where she forms an unexpected friendship with an older man in Tokyo.
Known for her unique personality, this popular streamer often advocates for mental health awareness, especially about Tourette’s syndrome, which she has openly shared about.
She has an infectious sense of humor and often blends her streams with just chatting and gaming content, but what really stands out are her unfiltered reactions and spontaneous commentary.
While she plays a variety of games, this streamer is particularly fond of Overwatch and often engages with her community in multiplayer gaming sessions.
This content creator gained attention on platforms like YouTube and Twitch for her candid approach to discussing everyday life and for breaking stereotypes about women in gaming.
She’s passionate about animals, especially her pet bunny, which often makes appearances during her streams.
This streamer has faced a lot of online challenges but is known for her resilience and using her platform to address harassment and raise awareness on important social issues.
Outside of gaming, she’s become an advocate for others with neurological conditions and has used her platform to help educate people about Tourette’s in a positive and light-hearted manner.
Fans love her for her genuine and relatable personality, often referring to her streams as a safe space where humor, honesty, and inclusivity thrive.
This actor made his breakthrough in the 1991 film about two women on a road trip, playing a charming drifter.
He won his first Academy Award for portraying a stunt double in a film set in the 1960s Hollywood, directed by Quentin Tarantino.
Known for his role in a movie about seven deadly sins, where he plays a detective alongside Morgan Freeman.
Played an aging character who grows younger as time goes by in a film directed by David Fincher.
Was once married to another Hollywood superstar who portrayed Lara Croft in "Tomb Raider."
Starred in a heist film series where his character is part of a crew that plans elaborate robberies in Las Vegas.
Famous for playing a legendary Achilles in a film based on the events of the Trojan War.
Portrayed an American soldier leading a team of Nazi hunters in a brutal World War II film directed by Quentin Tarantino.
